notes: পিসি means the speaker's paternal aunt, not प्रिय or कहानी.

src: fuck it.. i love you so much
tgt: भाड़मे जाए... हम तोरा सँ बहुत प्रेम करैत छी।
notes: Fuck it is an impersonal dismissal here, not a command directed at the listener.

src: fuck it... i don't care anymore
tgt: धुर... आब हमरा कोनो परवाह नहि अछि।
notes: Use an impersonal Maithili interjection and Maithili negation, not Hindi जाओ or नहीं है.
